tooltip.create_nomad.grappling_hook.desc: Uses backtank air instead of durability while air is available.  Right click to grapple to the block if in range.
tooltip.create_nomad.backpack.descriptio: The Backpack is a wearable storage item. When placed down, it also acts as a supply station that automatically refills your hotbar with items from its inventory while you’re nearby.
tooltip.create_nomad.track_pack.hint: Right-Click the air to take a stack out.
tooltip.create_nomad.track_pack.empty: Empty. Sneak + Right-Click to collect Create tracks from inventory.
tooltip.create_nomad.chainsaw.descriptio: Uses backtank air instead of durability while air is available.  Consumes 1 air per block broken, including timber-felled logs.
tooltip.create_nomad.jackhammer.descript: Uses backtank air instead of durability while air is available.  Mines stones and full veins of ores.
create_nomad.ponder.backpack_auto_hotbar: When an item stack in your hotbar runs low, the backpack refills it automatically.
Right click a placed backpack to bind to it.
Keep matching stacks inside the backpack and it will keep your hotbar stocked while you build.
Backpacks can be dyed into any color to match your style.
Use any dye with a backpack in crafting to recolor it!
tooltip.create_nomad.trackpack.descripti: Automatically refills stacks of tracks in your hotbar.
